examples.sentence: The bus can put up to 50 passengers comfortably during peak hours.
examples.translation: The bus can place as many as 50 passengers comfortably during peak hours.

examples.sentence: We managed to put up to ten suitcases in the trunk without any problem.
examples.translation: We managed to place as many as ten suitcases in the trunk without any problem.

examples.sentence: Could you put up to five more chairs in the conference room for the meeting?
examples.translation: Could you place as many as five more chairs in the conference room for the meeting?

examples.sentence: The stadium was designed to put up to 80,000 spectators safely for the event.
examples.translation: The stadium was designed to place as many as 80,000 spectators safely for the event.

examples.sentence: I don't know how she puts up with his constant complaining every day.
examples.translation: I don't know how she tolerates his constant complaining every day.

examples.sentence: We had to put up with the noisy construction next door for several months.
examples.translation: We had to endure the noisy construction next door for several months.

examples.sentence: If you put up with his bad habits now, it might get better over time.
examples.translation: If you tolerate his bad habits now, it might improve over time.

examples.sentence: They won't put up with any form of disrespect in the workplace.
examples.translation: They will not accept any form of disrespect in the workplace.

examples.sentence: During the debate, John accused me of putting words in his mouth, but I only asked questions.
examples.translation: During the debate, John accused me of attributing statements to him that he did not say, but I only asked questions.

examples.sentence: Don't put words in my mouth; I never said I was against the project.
examples.translation: Don't misrepresent me; I never said I was against the project.

examples.sentence: She felt that the reporter was putting words in her mouth by twisting her comments.
examples.translation: She felt the reporter was misrepresenting her words by twisting her comments.

examples.sentence: If you keep putting words in her mouth, she might refuse to talk to you again.
examples.translation: If you keep misrepresenting her, she might refuse to talk to you again.

examples.sentence: We agreed to handle the negotiations on the QT to avoid alerting the competitors.
examples.translation: We agreed to handle the negotiations secretly to avoid alerting the competitors.

examples.sentence: She passed me the information on the QT, warning me not to share it with anyone else.
examples.translation: She passed me the information confidentially, warning me not to share it with anyone else.

examples.sentence: If you want this deal to go through smoothly, keep it on the QT until everything is finalized.
examples.translation: If you want this deal to succeed, keep it secret until everything is finalized.

examples.sentence: The CEO shared a QT about the upcoming merger only with a select few executives.
examples.translation: The CEO shared a secret about the upcoming merger only with a select few executives.

examples.sentence: There’s a QT between the two departments regarding budget cuts that hasn’t been announced yet.
examples.translation: There’s a confidential matter between the two departments regarding budget cuts that hasn’t been announced yet.

examples.sentence: Keep this QT to yourself; it involves sensitive client information.
examples.translation: Keep this confidential information to yourself; it involves sensitive client information.

examples.sentence: They arranged the partnership on the QT to avoid public scrutiny during the initial phase.
examples.translation: They arranged the partnership discreetly to avoid public scrutiny during the initial phase.

examples.sentence: Hearing the thunderstorm outside, the children were quaking in their boots before bedtime.
examples.translation: Hearing the thunderstorm outside, the children were trembling with fear before bedtime.

examples.sentence: If the boss finds out about the mistake, he’ll be quaking in his boots for sure.
examples.translation: If the boss finds out about the mistake, he will be extremely frightened.

examples.sentence: She was quaking in her boots before giving the big speech at the conference.
examples.translation: She was trembling with fear before giving the big speech at the conference.

examples.sentence: During the horror movie, he literally quaked in his boots at every scary scene.
examples.translation: During the horror movie, he literally trembled with fear at every scary scene.

examples.sentence: The soldiers quaked in their boots as the enemy advanced closer to their position.
examples.translation: The soldiers trembled with fear as the enemy advanced closer to their position.

examples.sentence: She quaked in her boots when the thunder roared overhead during the storm.
examples.translation: She trembled with fear when the thunder roared overhead during the storm.

examples.sentence: Even the experienced climbers quaked in their boots at the sight of the steep cliff.
examples.translation: Even the experienced climbers trembled with fear at the sight of the steep cliff.

examples.sentence: The soldiers crafted a Quaker gun out of wood to make the enemy believe their defenses were stronger.
examples.translation: The soldiers made a dummy artillery piece from wood to deceive the enemy about their defenses.

examples.sentence: During the war, fake Quaker guns were used to bluff the opposing forces into retreat.
examples.translation: During the war, fake dummy cannons were used to bluff the opposing forces into retreat.

examples.sentence: The museum displayed a Quaker gun that was once used as a ruse de guerre in the 19th century.
examples.translation: The museum displayed a dummy artillery piece that was once used as a war deception in the 19th century.

examples.sentence: They painted wooden logs to resemble Quaker guns and placed them along the fort walls.
examples.translation: They painted wooden logs to look like dummy cannons and placed them along the fort walls.

examples.sentence: The CEO’s impressive presentation was just a Quaker gun, designed to mask the company's financial troubles.
examples.translation: The CEO’s impressive presentation was just a bluff meant to hide the company's financial troubles.

examples.sentence: That security system is a Quaker gun—it looks strong but won't stop a determined intruder.
examples.translation: That security system is a sham; it appears strong but won't stop a determined intruder.

examples.sentence: They used a Quaker gun in negotiations to give the illusion of having better options than they really did.
examples.translation: They used a bluff in negotiations to give the illusion of having better options than they really did.

examples.sentence: When choosing gifts, I always believe in quality over quantity to ensure lasting value.
examples.translation: When choosing gifts, I always prefer higher standard over a larger number to ensure lasting value.

examples.sentence: The company decided to focus on quality over quantity, producing fewer but better products.
examples.translation: The company decided to prefer higher quality instead of larger quantity, producing fewer but better products.

examples.sentence: She values quality over quantity in her friendships, preferring a few close companions.
examples.translation: She prefers excellence over number in her friendships, choosing a few close companions.

examples.sentence: In this project, we should put quality over quantity by producing a limited number of excellent prototypes.
examples.translation: In this project, we should prefer higher standard over larger number by producing a limited number of excellent prototypes.

examples.sentence: The artisan workshop insists on quality over quantity to maintain their reputation.
examples.translation: The artisan workshop insists on higher quality rather than larger quantity to maintain their reputation.

examples.sentence: For the exhibition, the curator chose quality over quantity, selecting fewer but more impactful artworks.
examples.translation: For the exhibition, the curator chose excellence over number, selecting fewer but more impactful artworks.

examples.sentence: We must remember quality over quantity when stocking the store, focusing on durable goods.
examples.translation: We must remember higher standard over larger number when stocking the store, focusing on durable goods.

examples.sentence: In quantum mechanics, particles sometimes pass through barriers by exploiting a quantum tunnel.
examples.translation: In quantum mechanics, particles sometimes pass through barriers by using a conceptual region called a quantum tunnel.

examples.sentence: The professor explained that the quantum tunnel allows electrons to appear on the other side of an energy barrier.
examples.translation: The professor explained that the quantum tunnel allows electrons to pass through an energy barrier.

examples.sentence: Quantum tunneling is a phenomenon where particles traverse a quantum tunnel despite classical restrictions.
examples.translation: Quantum tunneling is when particles pass through a quantum tunnel even though classical physics says they shouldn't.

examples.sentence: Scientists have observed particles moving through a quantum tunnel in certain semiconductor materials.
examples.translation: Scientists have observed particles passing through a quantum tunnel in certain semiconductor materials.

examples.sentence: In the sci-fi novel, the starship used a quantum tunnel to travel instantly between galaxies.
examples.translation: In the sci-fi novel, the starship used a hypothetical conduit called a quantum tunnel to travel instantly between galaxies.

examples.sentence: The movie depicted a quantum tunnel as a gateway for time travel and communication across eras.
examples.translation: The movie showed a quantum tunnel as a fictional pathway for time travel and communication across eras.

examples.sentence: Fans of the series often debate how the quantum tunnel allows characters to bypass space and time limits.
examples.translation: Fans of the series often discuss how the fictional quantum tunnel lets characters bypass space and time limits.

examples.sentence: The queen bee controls the hive’s activity by releasing specific pheromones to communicate with workers.
examples.translation: The queen bee manages the hive by releasing pheromones to communicate with worker bees.

examples.sentence: A healthy colony always has a single queen bee responsible for laying eggs and maintaining order.
examples.translation: A healthy colony always has one queen bee who lays eggs and keeps the hive organized.

examples.sentence: Researchers studied how the queen bee’s presence influences the behavior of the entire colony.
examples.translation: Researchers studied how the queen bee affects the behavior of the whole colony.

examples.sentence: During the inspection, the beekeeper located the queen bee to verify the colony’s health.
examples.translation: During inspection, the beekeeper found the queen bee to check the colony’s health.

examples.sentence: In the office, Lisa is the queen bee who decides everything and everyone follows her lead.
examples.translation: In the office, Lisa is the dominant woman who controls everything and everyone follows her.

examples.sentence: She acted like the queen bee of the social group, commanding attention wherever she went.
examples.translation: She behaved like the central woman in the group, attracting attention wherever she went.

examples.sentence: Although some saw her as the queen bee, she insisted she just wanted to help the team succeed.
examples.translation: Although some viewed her as the dominant woman, she said she only wanted to help the team succeed.

examples.sentence: The lioness, often called the queen of beasts, leads her pride with grace and strength.
examples.translation: The lioness, known as the queen of beasts, leads her group with grace and power.

examples.sentence: In many cultures, the lioness symbolizes the queen of beasts due to her hunting prowess.
examples.translation: In many cultures, the lioness represents the queen of beasts because of her hunting skill.

examples.sentence: The documentary highlighted the role of the lioness as the queen of beasts in the savannah ecosystem.
examples.translation: The documentary showed the lioness as the queen of beasts in the savannah ecosystem.

examples.sentence: She was hailed as the queen of beasts in the courtroom, dominating every argument with authority.
examples.translation: She was called the queen of beasts in court, dominating every argument with authority.

examples.sentence: The CEO’s commanding presence earned her the nickname 'queen of beasts' among her colleagues.
examples.translation: The CEO’s strong presence made her known as the 'queen of beasts' among colleagues.

examples.sentence: In the fantasy novel, the dragon was described as the queen of beasts, ruling over all creatures.
examples.translation: In the fantasy novel, the dragon was called the queen of beasts, ruling over all creatures.

examples.sentence: The lioness, as the queen of beasts, fiercely protects her cubs from any threats.
examples.translation: The lioness, being the powerful female animal, fiercely protects her cubs from threats.

examples.sentence: During the safari, we watched the queen of beasts resting in the shade after a long hunt.
examples.translation: During the safari, we saw the lioness resting after a long hunt.

examples.sentence: The queen of beasts is often portrayed as a symbol of strength and maternal care in wildlife studies.
examples.translation: The powerful female animal is often shown as a symbol of strength and maternal care in wildlife studies.

examples.sentence: Local guides always point out the queen of beasts when tracking big cats in the wild.
examples.translation: Local guides always indicate the lioness when tracking big cats in the wild.

examples.sentence: The community organized a campaign to combat queer bashing and promote acceptance.
examples.translation: The community organized a campaign to fight attacks and harassment against queer people.

examples.sentence: He spoke out publicly after witnessing queer bashing in his neighborhood park.
examples.translation: He spoke publicly after seeing attacks on queer people in his neighborhood park.

examples.sentence: Queer bashing remains a serious problem in many cities despite progress in LGBTQ+ rights.
examples.translation: Attacks on queer people remain a serious issue in many cities despite LGBTQ+ rights progress.

examples.sentence: They were queer bashing the new student simply because of his appearance.
examples.translation: They were harassing the new student because of his perceived queer identity.

examples.sentence: The group was arrested for queer bashing after a violent incident downtown.
examples.translation: The group was arrested for assaulting someone due to their real or perceived queer identity.

examples.sentence: Queer bashing often goes unreported, which makes it harder to address effectively.
examples.translation: Harassment based on queer identity often goes unreported, making it harder to tackle.

examples.sentence: The documentary shed light on queer bashing and the impact it has on victims’ lives.
examples.translation: The documentary highlighted violent behavior targeting queer people and its effects.

examples.sentence: Activists demand stronger laws to prevent queer bashing and protect marginalized communities.
examples.translation: Activists want stricter laws to stop attacks on queer people and protect vulnerable groups.

examples.sentence: Queer bashing incidents have increased alarmingly in certain areas over the past year.
examples.translation: Violent attacks on queer people have risen sharply in some regions over the past year.

examples.sentence: The victim reported being queer bashed near the city center late at night.
examples.translation: The victim reported being attacked and verbally abused near the city center late at night.

examples.sentence: Police are investigating a case where a man was queer bashed because of his sexual orientation.
examples.translation: Police are investigating an assault case where a man was attacked due to his sexual orientation.

examples.sentence: She refused to tolerate queer bashing in her school and started an awareness group.
examples.translation: She refused to accept harassment of queer people in her school and started a group for awareness.

examples.sentence: Queer bashing incidents are often underreported, making it difficult to assess their true frequency.
examples.translation: Attacks and verbal abuse targeting queer people are often not reported, making it hard to know how often they happen.

examples.sentence: Everyone at the office thinks Tom is a bit of a queer fish because of his unusual hobbies.
examples.translation: Everyone at the office thinks Tom is a bit odd or eccentric because of his unusual hobbies.

examples.sentence: She’s always been considered a queer fish due to her unconventional style and mannerisms.
examples.translation: She has been seen as eccentric because of her unconventional style and behavior.

examples.sentence: Don’t be a queer fish; try joining the team activities to fit in better.
examples.translation: Don’t act odd; try joining the team activities to fit in better.

examples.sentence: Back in the day, calling someone a queer fish was a way to imply they were homosexual.
examples.translation: Previously, calling someone a queer fish implied they were gay.

examples.sentence: He was unfairly labeled a queer fish by classmates because of rumors about his orientation.
examples.translation: Classmates unfairly called him a queer fish due to rumors about his sexuality.

examples.sentence: The term queer fish has fallen out of favor due to its mild derogatory implications related to sexual orientation.
examples.translation: The phrase queer fish is no longer popular because it mildly insults people based on sexuality.

examples.sentence: Mark is definitely a queer fish with his strange eating habits and odd sense of humor.
examples.translation: Mark is an unconventional person because of his strange eating habits and humor.

examples.sentence: You might be a queer fish if you enjoy things that most people find unusual or weird.
examples.translation: You could be considered eccentric if you like things others find unusual.

examples.sentence: That new teacher is a queer fish, but the students seem to like his unique approach.
examples.translation: The new teacher is odd, but students appreciate his unique style.

examples.sentence: In the small town, anyone who dressed differently was called a queer fish by the locals.
examples.translation: In the small town, anyone who looked unusual was called an eccentric person by the locals.

examples.sentence: Grandpa always said I was a queer fish because I preferred reading to sports.
examples.translation: Grandpa always said I was odd because I liked reading more than sports.

examples.sentence: She embraces being a queer fish, proud of her unconventional lifestyle and choices.
examples.translation: She accepts being eccentric, proud of her unconventional lifestyle and choices.

examples.sentence: The artist was a queer fish in the community, known for his avant-garde sculptures.
examples.translation: The artist was an eccentric person in the community, known for his avant-garde sculptures.

examples.sentence: The unexpected rainstorm really queered our pitch for the outdoor wedding ceremony.
examples.translation: The unexpected rainstorm spoiled our plans for the outdoor wedding ceremony.

examples.sentence: She tried to present her proposal, but his interruptions queered her pitch completely.
examples.translation: She tried to present, but his interruptions ruined her chances.

examples.sentence: If someone queers your pitch during negotiations, it’s best to stay calm and reassess.
examples.translation: If someone spoils your chances in negotiations, it’s best to stay calm and rethink.

examples.sentence: The competitor queered our pitch by releasing a better product just before our launch.
examples.translation: The competitor spoiled our plans by releasing a better product just before our launch.

examples.sentence: Don’t let anyone queer your pitch just because they disagree with your ideas.
examples.translation: Don’t let anyone spoil your plans just because they disagree with you.

examples.sentence: They queered our pitch by changing the schedule at the last minute, making it impossible to prepare.
examples.translation: They spoiled our plans by changing the schedule last minute, making preparation impossible.

examples.sentence: If your opponent queers your pitch during the game, try to adapt quickly to regain control.
examples.translation: If your opponent spoils your chances during the game, try to adapt quickly to regain control.

examples.sentence: After the failed investments, he found himself on Queer Street, struggling to pay bills.
examples.translation: After losing money, he was in financial trouble, struggling to pay bills.

examples.sentence: The company went on Queer Street when the market crashed unexpectedly last quarter.
examples.translation: The company went into financial distress when the market crashed last quarter.

examples.sentence: If you keep overspending, you might end up on Queer Street like many before you.
examples.translation: If you keep spending too much, you might face financial trouble like many others.
